# Features

## Planned Features

| Feature | Status |
| --- | --- |
| Basic chat interface | Planned |
| Claude AI integration | Planned |
| Muslim mode (scholarly answers) | Planned |
| New Muslim mode (encouraging guidance) | Planned |
| Dawah mode (bridge-building) | Planned |
| Islam.wiki data sourcing | Planned |
| Source citations | Planned |
| Conversation history | Planned |
| Embeddable JS widget | Planned |
| Human escalation to scholars | Planned |
| Rate limiting | Planned |
| User authentication | Planned |

## Merged from IslamQA

ChatIslam includes all functionality previously planned for IslamQA (islamqa.us):
- Fiqh Q&A with madhab-aware answers
- Ruling citations with evidence chains
- Scholar consensus indicators

IslamQA redirects to chatislam.org.
